package.name: ts_pack_php
package.description: A native PHP extension providing access to 248 tree-sitter language parsers. Parse, analyze, and chunk source code with a single process() call. Built on a high-performance Rust core via ext-php-rs.
package.notes:
Stable release with support for 305 programming languages.
Features: - Parse source code in 305 languages - Extract structure, imports, exports, comments, symbols - Code chunking for RAG applications - Language detection from file paths and content - Dynamic parser downloading
Please report issues at: https://github.com/kreuzberg-dev/tree-sitter-language-pack/issues

configureoption.name: enable-ts-pack-php
configureoption.prompt: Enable tree-sitter language pack PHP extension?

release.notes: Fix dynamic parser loading for c_symbol override languages.
